title: Add POST /api/settings/reload endpoint for manual config hot-reload

requirements: Call Config.reload() to refresh .env values into runtime config
Recreate coordinator with updated config if reload successful
Return JSONResponse with success:true and updated config values
Return error response if reload fails
acceptance: 5 test cases pass: verify by pytest novel_agent/tests/test_reload_endpoint.py -v
Endpoint exists: verify by rg 'POST.*reload|@app.post.*reload' novel_agent/web/app.py
Config.reload() called: verify by rg 'Config.reload\(\)' novel_agent/web/app.py
Returns config values: verify response includes current LLM config values

shared_context.pattern: POST endpoint → Config.reload() → coordinator recreation → return updated config

pre_analysis.action: Load context package for coordinator recreation pattern
Find existing coordinator recreation code in save_settings

implementation_approach.title: Red Phase - Write failing tests for reload endpoint
implementation_approach.description: Write 5 test cases that verify reload endpoint behavior
modification_points: Create 1 test file: novel_agent/tests/test_reload_endpoint.py with 5 test cases
Test 2: test_reload_calls_Config_reload - verify Config.reload() called once
Test 3: test_reload_returns_updated_config - verify response contains new config values
Test 4: test_reload_recreates_coordinator - verify coordinator recreated after reload
Test 5: test_reload_returns_error_on_failure - verify error response when Config.reload() fails
logic_flow: Write 5 test cases mocking Config.reload and coordinator recreation
Run pytest to verify tests fail (endpoint doesn't exist)
implementation_approach.output: 5 failing test cases for reload endpoint

implementation_approach.title: Green Phase - Implement POST /api/settings/reload endpoint
implementation_approach.description: Add reload endpoint that calls Config.reload() and recreates coordinator
modification_points: Add 1 endpoint in novel_agent/web/app.py: POST /api/settings/reload after save_settings
Call Config.reload() and check return value (True/False)
Recreate coordinator if reload successful using existing pattern
Return JSONResponse({'success': False, 'error': message}) if reload fails
logic_flow: Open novel_agent/web/app.py after save_settings endpoint (after line 343)
Call reload_success = Config.reload() inside try block
If reload_success is True: recreate coordinator, return success response with data
If reload_success is False: return error response
Run pytest to verify all 5 tests pass

implementation_approach.title: Refactor Phase - Extract reload logic and add validation
implementation_approach.description: Refactor to extract reload logic and add config validation
modification_points: Add 1 validation: verify required config fields present after reload
Add 1 logging statement: log reload operation with timestamp
Improve 1 error message: include which config fields failed to load
logic_flow: Extract reload-and-recreate logic into helper method
Add validation: check config.llm.api_key, config.llm.base_url are not None/empty
Add logging.info with timestamp and reloaded config values (sanitized)
Improve error message: list which fields are missing or invalid
Update reload endpoint to use helper and handle validation result
Run pytest novel_agent/tests/ -v to ensure no regressions
